name: Ching Chan Optical Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Ching Chan Optical Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures fastener equipment worldwide. The company offers sorter machines for screw/bolt, nut/washer, rod/stud, and eddy current series; second hand machines; and accessories for sorting machines. It also provides screw and bolt making machines, including standard and long stroke bolt, bolt parts, and high performance formers; process monitoring products; automated guided vehicle systems comprising warehouse and transferring robots; and intellectual automation production integration. Ching Chan Optical Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung City, Taiwan.
